code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    let first_tok = tokens.get(0).ok_or("missing")?
    let first = string.parse_int(first_tok).ok_or("parse error")?
    mut max_v = first
    mut min_v = first
    mut i = 1
    while i < n
      let tok = tokens.get(i).ok_or("missing")?
      let v = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("parse error")?
      if v > max_v
        max_v = v
      end
      if v < min_v
        min_v = v
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("max=#{max_v}")
    println("min=#{min_v}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
